compatibility: Issue codes, severities, and result impacts are public compatibility contract for v2.x.

codes.when_emitted: No word in the sentence has head = 0.
codes.result_impact: hard invalid for the scoped item; score = 0.0; band = invalid; risk_level = critical for sentence scope; document preserved

codes.when_emitted: More than one word in the sentence has head = 0.
codes.result_impact: hard invalid for the scoped item; score = 0.0; band = invalid; risk_level = critical for sentence scope; document preserved

codes.when_emitted: A word head is outside [0, len(words)].
codes.result_impact: hard invalid for the scoped item; score = 0.0; band = invalid; risk_level = critical for sentence scope; document preserved

codes.when_emitted: head_word_id does not match the word resolved by numeric head.
codes.result_impact: subtract 0.15 from the dependency family score for the scoped item; clamp family score to [0.0, 1.0]; document preserved

codes.when_emitted: A token word_ids entry does not reference a word in the same sentence.
codes.result_impact: hard invalid for the scoped item; score = 0.0; band = invalid; risk_level = critical for sentence scope; document preserved

codes.when_emitted: Dependency tree is not connected when interpreted over sentence words.
codes.result_impact: subtract 0.25 from the dependency family score for the scoped item; clamp family score to [0.0, 1.0]; document preserved

codes.when_emitted: A dependency node cannot be connected to root or any valid head.
codes.result_impact: subtract 0.1 from the dependency family score for the scoped item; clamp family score to [0.0, 1.0]; document preserved

codes.when_emitted: An evaluated sentence has zero words.
codes.result_impact: hard invalid for the scoped item; score = 0.0; band = invalid; risk_level = critical for sentence scope; document preserved

codes.when_emitted: Sentence text differs from the referenced text-unit slice and validate_text_slices is enabled.
codes.result_impact: subtract 0.2 from the structural family score for the scoped item; clamp family score to [0.0, 1.0]; document preserved

codes.when_emitted: Sentence start_char/end_char span is invalid.
codes.result_impact: hard invalid for the scoped item; score = 0.0; band = invalid; risk_level = critical for sentence scope; document preserved

codes.when_emitted: Token start_char/end_char span is invalid while sentence evaluation can continue.
codes.result_impact: subtract 0.1 from the structural family score for the scoped item; clamp family score to [0.0, 1.0]; document preserved

codes.when_emitted: Word start_char/end_char span is invalid while sentence evaluation can continue.
codes.result_impact: subtract 0.1 from the structural family score for the scoped item; clamp family score to [0.0, 1.0]; document preserved

codes.when_emitted: Entity start_char/end_char span is invalid.
codes.result_impact: hard invalid for the scoped item; score = 0.0; band = invalid; risk_level = critical for sentence scope; document preserved

codes.when_emitted: Entity text differs from the referenced text-unit slice.
codes.result_impact: subtract 0.25 from the entity family score for the scoped item; clamp family score to [0.0, 1.0]; document preserved

codes.when_emitted: Sentence has at least one finite verb-like word (upos in {VERB,AUX} and feats contains VerbForm=Fin) and no word has deprel in {nsubj,nsubj:pass,csubj,csubj:pass,expl}.
codes.result_impact: subtract 0.2 from the dependency family score for the scoped item; clamp family score to [0.0, 1.0]; document preserved

codes.when_emitted: Word has deprel in {aux,aux:pass,cop}; its resolved head exists; and resolved head upos is not one of {VERB,AUX,ADJ,NOUN,PROPN,PRON}.
codes.result_impact: subtract 0.15 from the dependency family score for the scoped item; clamp family score to [0.0, 1.0]; document preserved

codes.when_emitted: conj_ratio = count(non-punctuation words with deprel == conj) / count(non-punctuation words); emit once when ratio exceeds max_conj_ratio. If it also exceeds severe_conj_ratio in v2.0, do not emit another issue and do not apply an additional penalty.
codes.result_impact: subtract the single registry penalty 0.15 from the dependency family score once for the scoped item; clamp family score to [0.0, 1.0]; document preserved

codes.when_emitted: Emit only when the dependent/head pair matches the v2.0 suspicious pair list: (deprel=nsubj, dependent_upos=PUNCT), (deprel=obj, dependent_upos=PUNCT), or (deprel=det, head_upos=VERB).
codes.result_impact: subtract 0.1 from the dependency family score for the scoped item; clamp family score to [0.0, 1.0]; document preserved

codes.when_emitted: Word has deprel == acl:relcl and its resolved head upos is not one of {NOUN,PROPN,PRON}.
codes.result_impact: subtract 0.15 from the dependency family score for the scoped item; clamp family score to [0.0, 1.0]; document preserved

codes.when_emitted: Word has upos in {VERB,AUX}, feats contains VerbForm=Fin, and feats does not contain Tense=.
codes.result_impact: subtract 0.15 from the morphology family score for the scoped item; clamp family score to [0.0, 1.0]; document preserved

codes.when_emitted: empty_feats_ratio = count(non-punctuation words where feats is absent, empty string, or _) / count(non-punctuation words); emit once when ratio exceeds 0.5. If it also exceeds 0.7 in v2.0, do not emit another issue and do not apply an additional penalty.
codes.result_impact: subtract the single registry penalty 0.1 from the morphology family score once for the scoped item; clamp family score to [0.0, 1.0]; document preserved

codes.when_emitted: Emit only for the minimal explicit-number case: finite present-tense verb with Person=3|Number=Sing whose nsubj dependent has Number=Plur, or finite present-tense verb with Number=Plur whose nsubj dependent has Number=Sing.
codes.result_impact: subtract 0.2 from the morphology family score for the scoped item; clamp family score to [0.0, 1.0]; document preserved

codes.when_emitted: len(words) exceeds long_sentence_soft, max_sentence_length, or long_sentence_hard; emit once when any threshold is exceeded. v2.0 applies the single registry penalty regardless of how many thresholds are exceeded.
codes.result_impact: subtract the single registry penalty 0.15 from the sentence family score once for the scoped item; clamp family score to [0.0, 1.0]; document preserved

codes.when_emitted: Sentence text contains a newline.
codes.result_impact: subtract 0.1 from the sentence family score for the scoped item; clamp family score to [0.0, 1.0]; document preserved

codes.when_emitted: No word has upos in {VERB,AUX} in a sentence where sentence checks are enabled.
codes.result_impact: subtract 0.2 from the sentence family score for the scoped item; clamp family score to [0.0, 1.0]; document preserved

codes.when_emitted: noun_ratio = count(non-punctuation words with upos in {NOUN,PROPN,PRON}) / count(non-punctuation words); emit when noun_ratio > config.limits.max_noun_ratio.
codes.result_impact: subtract 0.1 from the distribution family score for the scoped item; clamp family score to [0.0, 1.0]; document preserved

codes.when_emitted: max_deprel_ratio = maximum frequency of any non-empty deprel among non-punctuation words / count(non-punctuation words); emit when max_deprel_ratio > config.limits.max_deprel_ratio.
codes.result_impact: subtract 0.1 from the distribution family score for the scoped item; clamp family score to [0.0, 1.0]; document preserved
